narrative:
Holmes County has 17,410 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.1 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.0% of registrants.
